title: Ken Lewchuk
compiled_truth: Ken Lewchuk is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-05-02 to 2001-12-14), Ken Lewchuk sent 19 and received 27 emails, totalling 46 interactions.
